task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the conditions CSV file with the required columns and trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'search_conditions.csv' with columns 'target_present', 'set_size', and 'corrAns', containing at least 12 rows of trial data.

task_completion.description: Verify the PsychoPy experiment flow contains the required routines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder Flow panel at the bottom of the screen showing routines named 'instructions' and 'trial'.

task_completion.description: Verify the trial routine contains components for the target and distractors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder Routine panel for 'trial' showing Text components configured for a target ('T') and up to five distractors ('L').

task_completion.description: Verify a code component is used to implement dynamic spatial randomization and orientations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Code component visible in the trial routine, or an open code properties window showing logic to randomize positions and distractor orientations (0, 90, 180, 270).

task_completion.description: Verify a loop is added around the trial routine and linked to the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Flow panel showing a loop around the trial routine, or the Loop Properties dialog showing 'search_conditions.csv' loaded as the conditions file.

task_completion.description: Verify the experiment is saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title displaying 'visual_search.psyexp' or a file explorer/terminal showing the files saved in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding components, editing properties), rather than writing the .psyexp XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely created the conditions file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent typing or editing the CSV data in a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the files are actually saved in the requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal output clearly showing the existence of 'visual_search.psyexp' and 'search_conditions.csv' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved as '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/visual_search.psyexp'. The conditions file must be at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search/search_conditions.csv' and contain the exact columns: 'target_present', 'set_size', and 'corrAns'. The experiment requires at least 6 components in total.
